title: OpenTalk Meeting Invitation - {{title}}
invitor: {{name}} invites you to an OpenTalk Meeting.
meeting-link-msg: Open the conference room in new tab/window
join-meeting-hint: If the buttons or links don't work open your browser and type in the following links:

call-in-paragraph-title: You can use your phone to participate in this meeting.
call-in-paragraph-content: Just dial in the following number and enter the given conference ID and conference PIN, or click the Quick-Dial number on your phone.
